title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 12 - 2017: Hidden Valia

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder, explaining a Google Earth project he's building called 'Hidden Valley' — a modeled ancient city-state within his fictional 'Kingdom of Boulder' — using Mantinea, an intact ancient Greek walled city, as his template for a 4km circumference, 10,000-person city-state. He also gives a brief life update covering sleeping in, shampooing his car to prepare it for sale, and plans to organize his electronics.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Mantinea (4km circumference) is the ideal template for an ancient city-state because it has a perfectly intact wall and is historically significant
10,000 people is the right round number for a standardized city-state, consistent with Boulder's 1915 population and Mantinea's estimated population
He is genuinely trying to sell it but wants to clean it properly first before listing it

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I just flushed the toilet and shouldn't have done that because the sound won't be on the recording.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm dragging something off to the side so it doesn't distract me.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I should have timed my tongue movement for the video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm making a Google Earth background first so I can talk about it at the beginning of the video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My daily vlog has a dual purpose: talking about my life and teaching something new about Google Earth.

claims.subject: Hidden Valley
claims.claim: Hidden Valley is a city-state within my kingdom of Boulder, with 10,000 people and 5,000 houses.

claims.subject: Hidden Valley
claims.claim: The houses in Hidden Valley are 10 meters in diameter, accommodating five people each.

claims.subject: Hidden Valley
claims.claim: Hidden Valley has a circumference of four kilometers, which I chose as the standard city-state size.

claims.subject: Mantineia
claims.claim: Mantineia is an ancient Greek city with a completely intact wall and a perfectly oval shape.

claims.subject: Mantineia
claims.claim: Mantineia was considered a perfectly sized city-state in ancient times.

claims.subject: Mantineia
claims.claim: Mantineia was the site of two of the biggest and most decisive battles in ancient Greece.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I standardized all my city-states to four kilometers as part of my education philosophy.

claims.subject: Ancient Boulder
claims.claim: The kingdom of ancient Boulder is the same diameter as ancient Rome.

claims.subject: Hidden Valley
claims.claim: I chose a population of 10,000 for Hidden Valley because it's a good round number and matches Boulder's population in 1915.

claims.subject: Ancient cities
claims.claim: In ancient times, a city-state's fighting force was about one-fifth of its total population.

claims.subject: Hidden Valley
claims.claim: Hidden Valley's public buildings include replicas of the Tower of London, the Statue of Jesus in Rio, and the Washington Monument.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got up at noon today because I've been under more stress than usual.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I organized my mic deck and plan to fit everything in my room.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Someone made a troll comment about me not trying to sell my car, but I am, I just need to clean it first.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I spent three hours shampooing my car seats today and used too much concentrate.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Tomorrow I plan to shampoo the other seats and list my car online.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I organized the electronics under my bed and couch today and will organize my hard drives tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I cleaned my floor for the first time in a while and will finish organizing tomorrow.
